missions.title: Biomolecules - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering carbohydrates, aldoses/ketoses, glucose and more.

microtargets.title: Carbohydrates
mustKnowFacts: Carbohydrates is a fundamental subtopic of Biomolecules.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Carbohydrates for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Carbohydrates during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Carbohydrates.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Carbohydrates.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Carbohydrates.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Carbohydrates.
